parsed.goal: Personal curiosity—demystifying the 'magic' of AI for a non-technical learner

modules.title: Translating Words to Numbers: The Alphabet of AI
modules.description: Computers don't read English; they only do math. This module strips away the magic by showing exactly how words are broken down into LEGO-like blocks and mapped like GPS coordinates so a computer can process them.

plan.goal: Explain how an LLM converts human words into numbers and spatial maps to understand relationships between concepts.
concepts: Concept proximity (why 'King' and 'Queen' are mathematically close)

modules.title: Grasping Context: How AI 'Reads' a Sentence
modules.description: If AI is just math, how does it know the difference between a river 'bank' and a money 'bank'? This module introduces the secret sauce that lets the model see the whole picture.

plan.goal: Understand how the 'Attention' mechanism allows the model to figure out the context of words without human comprehension.

modules.title: The Super-Autocomplete: How the 'Brain' Was Taught
modules.description: Tackling your question about how these models were trained. We will look at how forcing a machine to play a trillion games of 'guess the next word' accidentally taught it to reason.

plan.goal: Describe the training process of next-token prediction and how scaling up this simple task creates emergent, complex abilities.
concepts: Emergence (how quantity of data creates new skills like reasoning or coding)
sourceRefs: Phase 2: How It 'Understands' (The Magic of Scale)

modules.title: Hitting 'Send': What Happens When You Ask a Question
modules.description: Connecting all the dots. We will walk through the exact, step-by-step process of what happens inside the machine the second you send a prompt, and why its answer feels so human.

plan.goal: Map out the inference process from user prompt to final answer, including how human feedback shapes the AI's polite tone.
concepts: The Chef Analogy (Ingredients, Chopping, Spice Rack, Recipe, Cooking)
The statistical mirror (why it feels human)

modules.title: Translating Words to Numbers: The Alphabet of AI
Grasping Context: How AI 'Reads' a Sentence
The Super-Autocomplete: How the 'Brain' Was Taught
Hitting 'Send': What Happens When You Ask a Question
